rationale: The cited paper appears once in a brief theoretical-contribution paragraph, where it is used as an example of prior work arguing that low-fat labels may increase consumption via guilt reduction. The citing paper does not build its hypotheses, design, measures, or analyses on that study, nor does it engage its findings in detail. Its core mechanism (vice/virtue categorization and averaging in calorie estimates) is developed and tested independently, so this citation functions as contextual background rather than a direct intellectual dependency.
